name: TECHPRECISION CORP
business: TechPrecision Corporation manufactures precision large-scale fabricated and machined metal structural components and systems for defense and precision industrial customers. It operates through two subsidiaries, Ranor and Stadco, which serve the defense and aerospace sectors. The company does not design products but custom manufactures according to customer specifications.

exposures.sentence: We primarily serve customers in the defense and aerospace markets, secondarily in the precision industrial sectors.
Stadco manufactures large mission-critical components on several high-profile military aircraft, military helicopter, and military space programs.
We primarily serve customers in the defense and aerospace markets, secondarily in the precision industrial sectors.
